//: Project-scoped MCP config. Commit this to share with future-you (or teammates).
//2: Scopes in order of precedence: local > project > user.
//3: Versions pinned (checked via Sonatype). Bump deliberately; don't use @latest.

mcpServers.//filesystem: Read/write files in a sandboxed path. Uncomment and set ALLOWED_PATH.
mcpServers.//git: Local git operations beyond what Bash allows.
mcpServers.//github: GitHub issues, PRs, and repos. Official remote HTTP MCP (github/github-mcp-server). Requires GITHUB_TOKEN PAT, or use `claude mcp add` with OAuth.
mcpServers.//playwright: Browser automation — good for UI regression checks.
